span.p: build_path: target then ancestors then document then window into path 0..n-1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Phase 1 CAPTURING: fire_listeners path n-1 down to 1, capture listeners only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Phase 2 AT_TARGET: fire_listeners path 0 capture then bubble, reported phase 2

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Phase 3 BUBBLING: if bubbles, fire_listeners path 1..n-1, non-capture only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: fire_listeners: snapshot non-tombstoned matching-phase listeners, run on-handler first then each callback

span.p: clear currentTarget, eventPhase=0, reset stop flags; run default action
